title: Budget Setu
description: Statement-first personal finance app to aggregate, deduplicate, auto-categorize, and visualize transactions from UPI apps and bank accounts via PDF/CSV imports.
highlights: Rule-based auto-categorization engine with SHA-256 deduplication for UPI and bank statement imports
PDF and CSV statement imports from PhonePe, Google Pay, HDFC, ICICI, and SBI with deduplication
Interactive dashboard with cashflow trends, category breakdowns, and data export via ZIP archives

title: /learn.ref
description: A lightning-fast, zero-dependency learning reference platform capable of dynamically rendering technical study materials.
highlights: Modular routing engine that dynamically builds Grid or List layouts from JSON files
Completely decoupled architecture for easily adding new subjects like Kubernetes or System Design
Highly optimized, zero-dependency vanilla web stack for maximum performance

title: Docs App
description: A personal repository for technical notes, project documentation, and ongoing learning. Built to track my progress and explore new things.
highlights: Extremely fast, static-site generated documentation with full-text search
MDX support for writing rich content alongside React components
Automated Git timestamps and metadata parsing for dynamic sidebar routing

title: Blog App
description: Full-stack blogging platform with authentication, blog publishing, comments, likes, notifications, and admin/user role management.
highlights: JWT-based authentication with email verification and password reset
Blog CRUD with admin-defined categories, nested comment replies, likes, and real-time notifications
Profile management with Cloudinary image uploads, markdown editor with LaTeX support, and light/dark mode UI

title: Portfolio Website
description: Modern portfolio website built with React and styled-components featuring interactive animations.
highlights: Showcases my work, skills, and background
Includes a contact form so visitors can easily get in touch with me
Works smoothly on mobile, tablet, and desktop devices

title: Plant Disease Recognition System
description: Agricultural system that identifies potential plant diseases based on uploaded images using deep learning algorithms.
highlights: Accurate disease identification based on visual patterns
User-friendly interface for image upload
Model trained on approximately 87,000 RGB images of healthy and diseased plant leaves

title: Course Selling App
description: Scalable Node.js backend with MongoDB for an online course platform featuring JWT authentication, course management and secure payment tracking.
highlights: JWT authentication for admins and users
Course management with Cloudinary image uploads
Secure course purchase system

title: Online Examination System
description: Web-based platform for managing and conducting online exams with role-based access and secure exam flow.
highlights: Role-based login for admin, teacher, and student
Secure exam setup and automated evaluation
